title: Van Loveren Tasting Room at Klipheuwel
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Set on the scenic Klipheuwel...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Set on the scenic Klipheuwel Farm in Little Brak River, just outside Mossel Bay, our family-friendly tasting room is a welcoming destination for wine lovers of all ages.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Set on the scenic Klipheuwel Farm in Little Brak River, just outside Mossel Bay, our family-friendly tasting room is a welcoming destination for wine lovers of all ages."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’re proud to be nominated in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards - and we’d love your vote!","html":"We’re proud to be nominated in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards - and we’d love your vote!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our award-winning wines are served with curated experiences:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Christina & Chocolate: A premium tasting paired with artisanal chocolates crafted to complement each elegant wine.","html":"Christina & Chocolate: A premium tasting paired with artisanal chocolates crafted to complement each elegant wine."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Taste of Africa: A bold tribute to pinotage, South Africa’s signature varietal, with local flavour influences.","html":"Taste of Africa: A bold tribute to pinotage, South Africa’s signature varietal, with local flavour influences."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Undiscovered Gems: A playful, blushinspired journey through our rosé-style wines.","html":"Undiscovered Gems: A playful, blushinspired journey through our rosé-style wines."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tangled Tree Wine & Chocolate and Van Loveren Cheese & Wine Pairing: Classic flavours with a creative twist.","html":"Tangled Tree Wine & Chocolate and Van Loveren Cheese & Wine Pairing: Classic flavours with a creative twist."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Papillon Kids Tasting Platter: Grape juice and sweet treats for the little ones.","html":"Papillon Kids Tasting Platter: Grape juice and sweet treats for the little ones."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With tastings ranging from R80 to R195, there’s something for every palate.","html":"With tastings ranging from R80 to R195, there’s something for every palate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you’ve enjoyed a visit to our tasting room - or have it on your list - now’s the time to show your support.","html":"If you’ve enjoyed a visit to our tasting room - or have it on your list - now’s the time to show your support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vote Van Loveren at Klipheuwel – your favourite wine spot deserves the win!https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/","html":"Vote Van Loveren at Klipheuwel – your favourite wine spot deserves the win!
https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
